overview: OT TRANS OPERATING ROOM TRANSFER STRETCHER, STAINLESS STEEL 2 combinable and lockable 304 quality stainless steel chassis and 1 sliding stainless steel stretcher, one chassis for dirty area and another chassis for clean are (operating room) in order to transfer patient from dirty area to clean area Gas spring assisted backrest adjustment 304 quality Stainless Steel main structure Anti-microbial, water proof, flame retardant, air-permeable viscoelastic mattress Telescopic IV pole Collapsible, full length polyurethane side rails with safety lock mechanism Easily cleanable, compact laminate two section mattress platform 2 units of IV pole sockets and accessory sockets Drainage bag holders and accessory hooks Ergonomic pushing bars Protective corner bumpers 360° Swivel and lockable castors
